meaning: n.条件,情形,环境,社会地位vt.以...为条件,使达到要求的情况
examples: The piano was in good condition.
The car was in A1 condition.
Day by day his condition improved.
But, aside from the lack of pools, swimming in Britain is in good condition.
Paint still in its original condition, for example, can make or break the value of a chair.
